chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text: A toll road authority may not regulate a motorist information panel or business sign erected, maintained, or regulated under this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.057 — Regulation by Toll Road Authority

A toll road authority may not regulate a motorist information panel or business sign erected, maintained, or regulated under this subchapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A toll road authority may not regulate a motorist information panel or business sign erected, maintained, or regulated under this subchapter.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
